title: Dropdown Menu Component
content:
This file exports a set of composable components for creating dropdown menus, built on top of `@radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu`. These components provide a flexible and accessible way to implement custom dropdown menus in your application.

## Key Exports

- **`DropdownMenu`**: The root component that wraps all other dropdown menu elements. (Alias for `DropdownMenuPrimitive.Root`)
- **`DropdownMenuTrigger`**: The element that toggles the dropdown menu's visibility. (Alias for `DropdownMenuPrimitive.Trigger`)
- **`DropdownMenuGroup`**: Groups related dropdown menu items. (Alias for `DropdownMenuPrimitive.Group`)
- **`DropdownMenuPortal`**: Renders the dropdown menu content in a portal, typically to the body, for better stacking context. (Alias for `DropdownMenuPrimitive.Portal`)
- **`DropdownMenuSub`**: Enables nested sub-menus.
- **`DropdownMenuRadioGroup`**: A group for radio-style selection within a dropdown menu.
- **`DropdownMenuSubTrigger`**: The trigger for a sub-menu. Accepts `inset` prop for visual indentation.
- **`DropdownMenuSubContent`**: The content container for a sub-menu.
- **`DropdownMenuContent`**: The main content container for the dropdown menu. Accepts `sideOffset` prop.
- **`DropdownMenuItem`**: An individual item within the dropdown menu. Accepts `inset` prop for visual indentation.
- **`DropdownMenuCheckboxItem`**: A checkbox item for boolean selections within the dropdown menu.
- **`DropdownMenuRadioItem`**: A radio item for single selection within a dropdown menu.
- **`DropdownMenuLabel`**: A label for grouping or describing menu items. Accepts `inset` prop.
- **`DropdownMenuSeparator`**: A visual separator between menu items.
- **`DropdownMenuShortcut`**: Displays keyboard shortcuts associated with menu items.

## Usage Example

```tsx
import {
  DropdownMenu,
  DropdownMenuContent,
  DropdownMenuItem,
  DropdownMenuLabel,
  DropdownMenuSeparator,
  DropdownMenuShortcut,
  DropdownMenuTrigger,
} from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu";

function MyDropdown() {
  return (
    <DropdownMenu>
      <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
        <Button variant="outline">Open Menu</Button>
      </DropdownMenuTrigger>
      <DropdownMenuContent className="w-56">
        <DropdownMenuLabel>My Account</DropdownMenuLabel>
        <DropdownMenuSeparator />
        <DropdownMenuGroup>
          <DropdownMenuItem>
            Profile
            <DropdownMenuShortcut>⇧⌘P</DropdownMenuShortcut>
          </DropdownMenuItem>
          <DropdownMenuItem>
            Billing
            <DropdownMenuShortcut>⌘B</DropdownMenuShortcut>
          </DropdownMenuItem>
          <DropdownMenuItem>Settings</DropdownMenuItem>
        </DropdownMenuGroup>
        <DropdownMenuSeparator />
        <DropdownMenuGroup>
          <DropdownMenuItem>Team</DropdownMenuItem>
          <DropdownMenuSub>
            <DropdownMenuSubTrigger>Invite members</DropdownMenuSubTrigger>
            <DropdownMenuSubContent />
          </DropdownMenuSub>
          <DropdownMenuItem>
            New Team
          </DropdownMenuItem>
        </DropdownMenuGroup>
        <DropdownMenuSeparator />
        <DropdownMenuItem disabled>API Access</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuSeparator />
        <DropdownMenuItem>
          Log out
          <DropdownMenuShortcut>⇧⌘Q</DropdownMenuShortcut>
        </DropdownMenuItem>
      </DropdownMenuContent>
    </DropdownMenu>
  );
}
```

**Notes on Props:**

- **`inset`**: Applies an additional left padding for visual indentation, commonly used with labels and items within groups.
- **`sideOffset`**: Adjusts the vertical offset between the trigger and the dropdown content.
